author: jsign
content:
New [tests-zkevm@v0.5.0](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.5.0):
- Based on `tests-glamsterdam-devnet@v6.1.0` ([release](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-glamsterdam-devnet%40v6.1.0)) (i.e. `glamsterdam-devnet-6`)
- Add support for filling stateless benchmark fixtures with an external `t8n` tool, deriving `statelessInputBytes` / `statelessOutputBytes` from the returned `executionWitness`. 
- Explicitly fail stateless validation for invalid raw stateless input bytes, and add test coverage for malformed schema IDs, invalid SSZ bytes, trailing bytes, and related cases.
- Revisit and document the SSZ list maximum lengths used by the stateless witness/input types.
- Prune non-scheduled protocol fork variants from the zkEVM `ProtocolFork` enum.
- Add `ChainConfig` stateless validation tests, regression test for public-key validation, tighten witness state-write expectations so empty account storage tries do not include the empty node `0x80`. 

A bit o extra detail points and each one with linked PR for more details in [release description](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.5.0).
